title: Tender Boiled Thai Plum Tomatoes Curry
description: A soothing and flavorful vegan curry made with boiled plum tomatoes and aromatic spices, perfect for a sick day. This resinous and aerated Thai dish is sure to comfort and nourish.
instructions: Bring a large pot of salted water to a boil and gently add the plum tomatoes.
Boil the tomatoes for 10-12 minutes, or until the skin starts to peel off.
Remove the tomatoes from the water with a slotted spoon and let them cool.
Peel the cooled tomatoes and chop them into large chunks.
In a large pan, heat the coconut oil over medium heat and add the chopped onion.
Cook the onion for 5 minutes, or until it is translucent and starting to caramelize.
Add the minced garlic and grated ginger to the pan and cook for 1 minute.
Stir in the Thai red curry paste and cook for 1 minute, until fragrant.
Add the chopped tomatoes, coconut milk, vegetable broth, salt, and brown sugar to the pan.
Bring the mixture to a simmer and cook for 15-20 minutes, or until the flavors have melded together and the sauce has thickened.
